modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with answering Cisco phones when colleagues are unavailable

full_description_text: 
The user is trying to understand if they can answer phones for each other when one person is not there. They mention that the mainline does not roll to either of them, which means calls are not coming to their phones when the other is not available. The user is also asking how to make a change to the configuration of a Cisco phone. There seems to be confusion about how the phone system works and how to set it up correctly for their needs.
